---
title: "SAMMY ODEYEMI"
about: 
    template: jolla
    image-width: 13em
    image-shape: rectangle
    image: sammycolored.jpg
    links:
       - icon: github
         text: Github
         href: github.com/Sammyoddy
       - icon: twitter
         text: Twitter
         href: twitter.com/arduinounoboy
       - icon: linkedin
         text: Linkedin
         
         href: linkedin.com
       - icon: envelope
         text: Email
         href: mailto:thesamuelodeyemi@gmail.com
---

```{=html}
<h2>Hi!, I am a Data Analyst with expertise in SQL, R and Power BI.<p>I specialize in transforming complex data into clear insights for informed decision-making</p></h2>
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{=html}
<section id="portfolio"> 
  <header>
    <h1 style="text-align:left;">My Portfolio</h1>
  </header>
  <div style="display:flex; justify-content: space-between;">
    <div style="flex:50%; padding: 10px;">
      <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;">
        <img src="/fifa21/fifa212.jpg" style="width:384px;height:250px;">
        <a class="btn btn-primary" href="#" role="button" target="_blank" style="width:169px;height:51px;padding:10px;">View Project</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="flex:50%; padding: 10px;">
      <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;">
        <img src="/audible/audiblemain.jpg" style="width:384px;height:250px;">
        <a class="btn btn-primary" href="#" role="button" target="_blank" style="width:169px;height:51px;padding:10px;">View Project</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
